title: Hul Rapuung
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Yuuzhan Vong |image= |name=Hul Rapuung |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Yuuzhan Vong]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= |caste=[[Warrior caste]] |domain=[[Domain Rapuung]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|The trawling schedules are filled for another four days. Perhaps you may spend that time in sacrifice and penitence begging Yun-Shuno to intercede for you. A word could be planted in your executor's ear.''"
"''That is most generous, Hul Rapuung. But I do not require favor.''"
"''It is no favor to be given time to beg, even of the gods.|Hul Rapuung and Vua Rapuung|}} '''Hul Rapuung''' was the brother of [[Vua Rapuung]] and a [[Warrior caste|Warrior]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. He was assigned to [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] when the Yuuzhan Vong took the moon. While there, he ran into his brother, but did not seem to treat him with the usual contempt the high-caste Yuuzhan Vong held the [[Shamed Ones]] in. When [[Mezhan Kwaad]] refused to answer Vua's questions, and when [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Tsaak Vootuh]] refused to intercede, Hul challenged Kwaad, asking if any doubted the gods favor of Vua. After Kwaad revealed that she had infected Vua with a virus and was killed, Hul told Vua that he was a warrior again and should kill [[Anakin Solo]]. Vua refused and stunned Hul with an [[amphistaff]] and went on to kill many Yuuzhan Vong warriors before being killed. In some legends of the [[Jeedai heresy|''Jeedai'' heresy]], Hul fought side by side with the redeemed Vua, while in others, it was he, not Mezhan Kwaad, who killed Vua. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest]]'' {{1st}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]'' {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Hul Rapuung |es=Hul Rapuung }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Rapuung, Hul}} [[Category:Domain Rapuung]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Yuuzhan Vong warriors]]
